whale_scope.purpose: Define whale wallet tracking architecture without API/RPC, wallet access, live feed, runtime binding, DB write, or trade authority.

whale_domains.name: Whale Source Taxonomy
whale_domains.purpose: Define source classes without external calls.

whale_domains.name: Known Exchange / CEX Cluster Boundary
whale_domains.purpose: Prevent exchange omnibus wallets from being treated as individual whales.

whale_domains.name: Smart Money / Insider / Deployer Separation
whale_domains.purpose: Separate true whale, deployer, insider, sniper, and coordinated wallets.

whale_domains.name: Fake Whale / Real Whale Separation
whale_domains.purpose: Block wash wallets, sybil clusters, and liquidity mirage signals.

whale_domains.name: Whale Flow Direction Contract
whale_domains.purpose: Classify accumulation, distribution, exit, rotation, and trap behavior.

whale_domains.name: Whale Evidence Contract
whale_domains.purpose: Attach evidence level and confidence to every whale assertion.

whale_domains.name: Whale Risk Interaction Boundary
whale_domains.purpose: Whale signal may inform risk, but cannot authorize trade.

whale_domains.name: Whale Shadow Dryrun Route
whale_domains.purpose: Prepare V2_45 shadow dryrun with fixtures only.

whale_hard_boundaries: Whale engine cannot call API/RPC in V2_44.
Whale engine cannot track live wallets in V2_44.
Whale engine cannot write DB in V2_44.
Whale engine cannot bind runtime in V2_44.
Whale engine cannot touch wallet/private-key material.
Whale engine cannot send outbound packet.
Whale signal is evidence and classification only.
